title: Upstart Q3 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Upstart achieved significant momentum in Q3 2024 with revenue of $162 million, up 20% year-over-year, and returned to positive adjusted EBITDA of $1 million. The company reached this profitability milestone one quarter ahead of schedule. Dave Girouard stated that Model 18 drove large conversion improvements in Q3 through enhanced risk differentiation. Lending volume grew 43% sequentially, reaching approximately 188,000 loans. Q3 marked the largest origination quarter in two years despite elevated interest rates. Auto lending originations increased 46% sequentially to $26.5 million with the company signing its 11th OEM agreement. HELOC originations more than doubled sequentially, with an instant approval rate reaching 49% of applicants. Upstart introduced the T-Prime Program targeting super-prime borrowers, expanding its addressable market. Over half of loan funding now comes from committed partnerships rather than spot market funding. A notable $2 billion partnership with Blue Owl's Atalaya affiliate demonstrates innovative partnership structures in the capital markets. Q4 2024 guidance projected total revenues of approximately $180 million, adjusted EBITDA of approximately $5 million, and contribution margin of approximately 59%. The company emphasized that future growth will continue leveraging AI model improvements rather than waiting for macroeconomic relief.
